summary: Weak-pi pODMR terminal result was copied and reviewed. Raw/readout-aware evidence supports a clear usable r03 resonance at 3.876 GHz (all readout views and all 4 averages share the minimum; raw drop about 14.3% vs edge median; drift average 4 recorded as provenance). A Ramsey/T2star model/protocol/advisory review was completed; the initial 8 us/51 point plan was rejected for exceeding the 450 s tracking cap, then a revised 6 us/31 point det=1.5 MHz plan was verified and submitted. First Ramsey/T2star scout is now running as nv23_ramsey_20260513_185505_auto_ramsey; live status showed average 1/4 running and final-count text 43.890 kcps. State, note, evidence ledger, and lab log were updated.
next_action: Wait for terminal result of nv23_ramsey_20260513_185505_auto_ramsey. When terminal, copy result/status/job/control and batch state, complete intent image145844_reimage_r03_ramsey_t2star_scout_20260513_1850, raw-export the savedexperiment, then perform raw/readout-aware Ramsey, drift, fit-after-signal, and FFT review before making any T2star or 13C conclusion.
